parsed_profile.pov_distance: Third-person limited with multi-viewpoint rotation; strategic omniscience on protagonist's true plans; comic distance on protagonist's performative cowardice
parsed_profile.sentence_rhythm: Rapid-fire dialogue exchanges during council scenes; longer expository passages for strategic reasoning; staccato action beats during combat
parsed_profile.paragraphing: Short punchy paragraphs for tension; extended blocks for tactical explanation; single-line action beats for combat rhythm
parsed_profile.dialogue_method: Distinct voice registers across advisors with competing philosophies; protagonist's anachronistic casual register contrasts with period-appropriate authority voices
parsed_profile.description_method: Sparse environmental description; focus on character reactions and emotional states; period markers as flavor
parsed_profile.exposition_method: Strategy explained through advisor debate; tactical reasoning revealed in retrospect; parallel historical examples as analytical frame
parsed_profile.hook_delivery: Crisis interruption pattern: decision nearly reached, new information forces pivot to new tactical consideration
parsed_profile.transition_method: Scene break with chapter title as temporal marker; strategic consequence chains connecting setpieces

reader_promise: A strategist who weaponizes their own reputation for cowardice, turning predictable defeat into devastating double reversals while alliance partners execute simultaneous campaigns across multiple fronts
core_engine: Strategic reputation weapon—being known as predictable enables actual unpredictability through staged defeat and multi-layered reversal
state_variables: {'phase': 'siege under pressure', 'conditions': 'Alliance depleted, forces exhausted from prolonged campaign', 'tension': 'Advisor council fractures between cautious preservation and aggressive action'}
{'phase': 'strategic proposal', 'conditions': 'Protagonist offers seemingly foolish surrender pathway', 'tension': 'Antagonist recognizes apparent victory opportunity, overconfidence activated'}
{'phase': 'deceptive commitment', 'conditions': 'Antagonist accepts staged defeat, commits resources to false victory path', 'tension': 'Alliance partner positioned to exploit distraction'}
{'phase': 'second front activation', 'conditions': 'Partner opens simultaneous multi-front coordination', 'tension': "Antagonist's attention divided, initial front under-resourced"}
{'phase': 'double reversal revelation', 'conditions': 'Apparent defeat exposed as victory disguised as surrender', 'tension': 'Antagonist trapped by own overconfidence in predictable target'}
reader_rewards: Double-layered tactical reveal: staged defeat serves deeper strategic purpose
Antagonist overconfidence arc payoff with subsequent failure
Character-driven strategy discussion with conflicting advisor viewpoints
Military campaign sustainability examination through exhaustion narrative
Alliance dynamics exploration via simultaneous multi-front action
reusable_mechanisms: Staged defeat with pre-positioned escape route to buy time for allies
Double reversal: apparent victory is actually defeat disguised as victory
Strategic reputation weapon: known predictability enables actual unpredictability
Advisor council with competing tactical philosophies (aggressive vs cautious)
Force exhaustion from prolonged siege creating vulnerability
Alliance partner exploiting distraction to open second front
Authorial historical parallel as in-world lesson mechanism
Crisis interruption pattern driving tactical pivots
non_reusable_specifics: Named historical locations and geographic markers
Specific general names and battlefield deaths
Specific troop numbers and formation details
risk_patterns: {'pattern': 'protagonist_intelligence_fluctuation', 'description': 'Protagonist varies between transparent and opaque; strategic omniscience inconsistent', 'mitigation': 'Establish clear information symmetry rules early'}
{'pattern': 'staged_defeat_trust_dependency', 'description': 'Mechanism requires reader to trust revelation before confirmation', 'mitigation': 'Provide earlier proof-of-concept for reversal logic'}
{'pattern': 'historical_knowledge_assumption', 'description': 'Setting assumes reader familiarity with source material', 'mitigation': 'Ground parallel examples in accessible universal concepts'}
{'pattern': 'anachronistic_tone_inconsistency', 'description': 'Modern humor may clash with period setting', 'mitigation': "Integrate protagonist's temporal distance as explicit character trait"}
{'pattern': 'manufactured_crisis_timing', 'description': 'Information timing may feel contrived if patterns become predictable', 'mitigation': 'Vary crisis sources and interruption triggers'}
